Class ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReactiveRedisConnection.Command
Enclosing interface:
ReactiveZSetCommands
public static class ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand extends ReactiveRedisConnection.KeyCommand
ZADD command parameters.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Christoph Strobl
See Also:
  • Redis Documentation: ZADD

    Applies ch mode (Modify the return value from the number of new elements added, to the total number of elements changed).

  • Method Details

    • tuple

      public static ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand tuple(Tuple tuple)
      Creates a new ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand given a Tuple.
      Parameters:
      tuple - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand for Tuple.

    • tuples

      public static ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand tuples(Collection<? extends Tuple> tuples)
      Creates a new ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand given a Collection of Tuple.
      Parameters:
      tuples - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand for Tuple.

    • to

      public ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand to(ByteBuffer key)
      Applies the key. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Parameters:
      key - must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand with key applied.

    • xx

      public ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand xx()
      Applies xx mode (Only update elements that already exist. Never add elements). Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand with xx applied.

    • nx

      public ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand nx()
      Applies nx mode (Don't update already existing elements. Always add new elements). Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand with nx applied.

    • ch

      public ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand ch()
      Applies ch mode (Modify the return value from the number of new elements added, to the total number of elements changed). Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand with ch applied.

    • incr

      public ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand incr()
      Applies incr mode (When this option is specified ZADD acts like ZINCRBY). Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties. Note that the command result returns the score of the member.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand with incr applied.

    • gt

      public ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand gt()
      Applies GT mode. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand with incr applied.
      Since:
      2.5

    • lt

      public ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand lt()
      Applies LT mode. Constructs a new command instance with all previously configured properties.
      Returns:
      a new ReactiveZSetCommands.ZAddCommand with incr applied.
      Since:
      2.5

    • getTuples

      public List<Tuple> getTuples()
      Returns:

    • isUpsert

      public boolean isUpsert()
      Returns:
      true if the command does not contain NX or XX flags.

    • isIfExists

      public boolean isIfExists()
      Returns:
      true if the command contains the XX flag.
      Since:
      3.1.5

    • isIfNotExists

      public boolean isIfNotExists()
      Returns:
      true if the command contains the NX flag.
      Since:
      3.1.5

    • isIncr

      public boolean isIncr()
      Returns:

    • isGt

      public boolean isGt()
      Returns:
      true if GT is set.
      Since:
      2.5

    • isLt

      public boolean isLt()
      Returns:
      true if LT is set.
      Since:
      2.5

    • isReturnTotalChanged

      public boolean isReturnTotalChanged()
      Returns:
